# UC-22.41.6 · Cross-cutting — Cisco ISE Certificate Lifecycle Attestation (NAC PKI)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously attest cross-cutting certificate lifecycle health for ISE NAC PKI. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously attest cross-cutting certificate lifecycle health for ISE NAC PKI.

## Value

Multiple frameworks require crypto lifecycle controls. This UC produces shared evidence.

## Implementation

Daily.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence`.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Cert near expiry. Evidence captured.

### Negative scenario

All certs valid. Empty result.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.31 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.41.6: Cert Lifecycle Attestation]
cron_schedule = 0 7 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.41.6,family=encryption_key_mgmt
```

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (36003, 36004, 36005, 35201) earliest=-1d
| stats count by certificate_subject, MessageCode
| eval evidence_status="cert_lifecycle_attestation"
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

Cross-framework PKI attestation dashboard.

## Known False Positives

1. Test certs.
